## Related issue

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` is clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] Behaviour changes are covered by tests
- [ ] Docs updated if needed (and the **MSR spec + JSON Schema** if the format changed)
- [ ] The `wasm32` build still compiles if shared code changed
